CVE-2023-5349.title: A memory leak flaw was found in ruby-magick, an interface between ...
CVE-2023-5349.description: A memory leak flaw was found in ruby-magick, an interface between Ruby and ImageMagick. This issue can lead to a denial of service (DOS) by memory exhaustion.
